## Goal

<!-- Which chapter should be written or updated? -->

## Context

Read before starting:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- `book/src/SUMMARY.md`

## Required Output

<!-- Which files should be created or updated? -->

Create or update:

- `book/src/XX-chapter/XX-page.md`

If adding a new chapter, also update:

- `book/src/SUMMARY.md`

## Chapter Type

<!-- specification / architecture / developer-guide / reference -->

## Rules

- Follow the terminology in `00-front-matter/05-terminology.md`.
- Use normative language as defined in `00-front-matter/04-normative-language.md`.
- Keep PlayOS engine-agnostic.
- Distinguish Runtime Devices from SDK Targets where relevant.
